title: Brave New World
author: Aldous Huxley
description: A profiling of a futuristic World State where citizens are genetically engineered, socially stratified, and kept content via psychological conditioning and drugs.

title: The Pillars of the Earth
author: Ken Follett
description: A sweeping historical epic set in 12th-century England, centered around the decades-long construction of a massive Gothic cathedral.

title: Twilight
author: Stephenie Meyer
description: The romance that begins when teenager Bella Swan moves to a rainy Washington town and falls in love with Edward Cullen, a literal vampire.

title: Project Hail Mary
author: Andy Weir
description: A lone astronaut must use his scientific wits to solve an extinction-level threat to Earth, aided by an unexpected alien ally.
